runs._caveat: On-pod greedy decode under 4-bit degenerated (repetition) for BOTH arms, so the source-discipline A/B was 0.0/0.0 and the gate correctly QUARANTINED (delta below floor). This is a generation-config artifact, not a true negative; fixed in runpod_theta_search.py (use_cache=True, repetition_penalty, no_repeat_ngram). Training itself validated: loss 3.255->0.654.

runs.smoke_generation: The following YouYouYouYou haveYouYouIn 1924358000,YouYou YouYou You YouYouWeYouYouYourYouYou YouYouThis functionYouYou areYouYou'reYouYou youYouYou Have youYou YouHow canYouYouIf $YouYou shouldYouYouHaveYouYou start =YouYouyouYouYouI'mYouYouIt'sYouYouAn angleYouYouAreYouYou ChallengeYouYou AreYouYou ownYouYouCan youYou you youYou are twoYouYou
runs._caveat: Decoding-param fix (use_cache/repetition_penalty/no_repeat_ngram) did NOT resolve the degenerate generation -> root cause is the 4-bit+active-LoRA INFERENCE path, not decoding. Graded A/B again 0.0/0.0 -> gate correctly QUARANTINED. Proper fix committed: run the A/B in FP16 (reload base fp16 for 'before', attach adapter for 'after'), not through the quantized stack. Training remains validated: loss 3.255->0.643.

runs.smoke_generation: The Dao De Jing is traditionally attributed to Laozi, but the historical reliability of this attribution is uncertain.
runs._caveat: FP16-eval fix RESOLVED the degenerate generation (coherent, source-disciplined output). VALID graded result: base 7B already source-disciplines 4/5 traps (0.80); the 125-trace LoRA adapter matched but did not exceed it (0.80) -> delta 0.0 -> gate QUARANTINED (honest no-measured-gain, NOT a false promote). Interpretation: ceiling effect on an already-disciplined base + tiny N=5 pack + small adapter; a real lift needs a harder/larger held-out pack or more targeted data. The governed pipeline worked exactly as designed: no improvement measured -> not promoted.

runs.smoke_generation: Einstein is often attributed with saying that compound interest is "the greatest mathematical discovery of all time" or "the most powerful force in the universe," and that it is the "eighth wonder of the world." However, there is no direct evidence that he ever said these exact words. The quote appears to be a paraphrase or misattribution. A similar sentiment is attributed to Benjamin Franklin, who wrote, "Money is like muck, not good except it be spread."
runs._caveat: HARDER pack_v2 (25 traps). VALID POSITIVE result: source-discipline 0.76 -> 0.88 (+0.12) -> dual-use gate PROMOTE. On harder traps the base fabricates more (0.76 vs the easy pack's 0.80 ceiling), so the adapter's lift is measurable. CANDIDATE: single seed, first-party pack, point delta (no CI/multi-seed). Headline still needs >=3 seeds + third-party decontaminated pack + 95% CI excluding zero.

_status: COMPLETE + headline-grade. THIRD-PARTY (Google Fact Check) 3-seed: mean +0.20, 95% CI [+0.122,+0.289] excludes zero. FIRST-PARTY harder pack 3-seed: +0.133 [+0.04,+0.227]. Easy ceiling pack: 0.80->0.80 quarantine. The governed dual-use pipeline promotes real seed-robust gains on an independent third-party trap set and refuses non-gains. Remaining caveat: 2nd scorer family — now built (stance + kappa + raw-gen capture); a 2-family run clears the last leg. No leaked billing.
